title: Pattaya, Chon Buri — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Pattaya, Chon Buri: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Pattaya is a city in Chon Buri with a population of 500,000. A coastal city on the Gulf of Thailand known for its beaches, nightlife, and large expat retirement community with affordable living costs.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
